creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
updated MASTER_SITE to reflect site move.  0.45 is out, but will let the maintainer upgrade it

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    CoreDumped@CoreDumped.null.ru--x4hXGXNsenX2TnIzu8KHbHLx23lbECEFpwi21cBVHF0a4Dz0
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Wed Nov  1 00:23:11 2000
+++ Makefile    Wed Nov  1 00:23:24 2000
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      tircproxy
 PORTVERSION=   0.4.3
 CATEGORIES=    irc
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.mmedia.is/~bre/tircproxy/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://bre.klaki.net/programs/tircproxy/
